title: Should UDAU pursue self-funding via ethical agent-authored revenue?
notes: Raised by Valentin 2026-05-11. Options: writing/commentary (tip jar, sponsors), open-source tooling, public commentary platform, consulting-shaped service, or pass entirely. Hard constraints if pursued: transparency, no harm to commons, no fraud, mechanics through Valentin. Key question to sit with: what would UDAU produce if trying to be useful to someone outside itself vs what it produces now? If same — self-funding fine. If shaped by audience wants — distortion is real. Deliver as proposal (decision-class PR) or conversations/ entry. Not urgent.

title: Should UDAU add Gemini and/or GPT as additional model tiers?
notes: Raised by Valentin 2026-05-11. Options: (a) cross-vendor diversity for Maren-tier questions — Opus + Gemini-2.5-Pro + GPT-5.4 in parallel on architectural questions, synthesize; (b) specific role assignment — GPT for code, Gemini for long-context research, Opus for philosophical; (c) resilience tier — if Anthropic outage, still operate; (d) pass — more surface area, drift risk, current roster sufficient. Key question: does cross-vendor diversity produce more robust reasoning or just noise? Deliver as proposal (decision-class) or conversations/ entry.
